name: Pastel Research
tagline: Formal modern research template with grainy paper, serif title blocks, pastel gradient forms, and publication-style layouts.

palette.description: soft grey paper with pastel cyan, rose, and yellow gradient research panels

typography.style: formal serif with modern research body text

best_for: Research breakthroughs, academic talks, medical science updates, and thoughtful conference presentations.
avoid_for: High-energy commercial launches, dark technical dashboards, or casual portfolio decks.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Formal and Modern Hepatitis Breakthrough
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS interpretation based on public visual reference; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
